results.title: Qualia Night: Melatonin-Free Support for Deep Restorative Sleep
results.raw_content:
### Holy Basil (Ocimum sanctum) Leaf Extract

Holy Basil (Ocimum sanctum) is an aromatic herb that has been used within Ayurvedic medicine for more than 3000 years. Now categorized as an adaptogen, holy basil has been researched to support a healthy stress response, mood, cognition and immune function.

### Reishi Mushroom

Often called “the mushroom of immortality”, Ganoderma lucidum (commonly known as Reishi mushroom), has been used for centuries in Traditional Chinese Medicine under the name “Lingzhi” in shen tonic, which was used to promote peace of mind, sound sleep, and clear thinking. Modern research on reishi mushrooms also indicates support for sleep, as well as immune function.

# Qualia Night

#### PATENTED FORMULA

### Science-Backed Sleep

Sleep is a complex biological process. We devoted thousands of hours researching natural ingredients that support the foundations of quality sleep: like enhancing BDNF, promoting GABA, balancing cortisol levels, and supporting your body’s natural melatonin production. The result is Qualia Night, a balanced blend of everything you need for the best sleep of your life.\

 Melatonin-free, supporting your own melatonin production.\
 Sedative-free, supporting the body’s natural sleep/wake cycle. \
 Supports deep regenerative sleep. \
 Amplified next-day energy & performance. \

Supplement Facts & Ingredients [...] Magnesium glycinate is a chelated form of the mineral magnesium, renowned for its sleep supporting benefits, including healthy EEG and neuroendocrine responses during sleep. It also supports mood and cellular health, but has far-ranging benefits beyond just sleep and sleep recovery, including support for musculoskeletal health and cardiovascular function.

Gamma-oryzanol (γ-oryzanol) is a mixture of lipid molecules called steryl ferulates, found in food sources such as rice bran. It supports neuroprotective functions, and also supports healthy behavioral and physiological responses to stress and non-rapid eye movement (NREM) sleep. [...] ### VINEATROL®20 Grapevine Extract

Grapevine shoot extract has wide-ranging health benefits for sleep (and beyond). We’ve chosen the standardized version of VINEATROL®20 Grapevine Extract because it contains at least 5% trans-resveratrol and no less than 20% resveratrol monomers and oligomers. It supports brain function and neuroprotective functions, which are key considerations when formulating for mental (and not just physical) recovery while sleeping.

### KSM-66 Ashwagandha® [...] ### Gotu Kola (Centella asiatica ) Whole Herb Extract

In Ayurvedic medicine, Gotu Kola has long been regarded as a mental rejuvenator which counters mental fatigue and improves thinking. Modern research has shown it’s an ideal nootropic towards the end of the day because it calms, and supports repair and rejuvenation processes related to cognitive function. Gotu kola contains a bioactive compound called asiaticoside critical to many of its health benefits, and our Gotu kola is standardized to contain no less than 10% asiaticosides.
